title: hieracium caesium subsp. petiolatulum
intro: Hieracium caesium subsp. petiolatulum, also known as the 'blue mouse ear' or 'small-leaved hawk's beard', is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium caesium subsp. petiolatulum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties.
